overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt running along a dirt path through a sunny rural countryside. The character moves from a settlement edge with wooden houses and NPCs through open fields with stone walls and into a forested trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural settlement edge with vineyard and wooden house

agents.ego_description: Geralt runs steadily along the dirt path, approaching a wooden house while passing peasants working near the vineyard

notable_agents.action: peasant woman walking along the right side of the path
group of children standing and walking on the path ahead

entered.detail: small rustic wooden cottage with dark timber walls and a gabled roof
rough-hewn wooden fence posts lining the left side of the path
rows of cultivated grape vines on the sloping hillside

segments.scene_description: Geralt runs along a dirt path at the edge of a rural settlement, with a wooden house ahead and vineyards on the left. Peasants walk along and across the path in the bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside with stone walls and cultivated fields

events.description: passing the wooden house and transitioning into open countryside with stone walls
Geralt turns left to follow the winding dirt path through the fields

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues running past the settlement into open fields, navigating around field workers and following the curving path

notable_agents.action: field worker tending to crops beside the stone wall

entered.detail: low stacked stone wall running parallel to the path on the right
tall stone tower visible on the horizon beyond the trees

segments.scene_description: Leaving the settlement behind, Geralt runs through open countryside bordered by stone walls and fields. A distant tower is visible on the horizon as the path curves left through the rural landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested rural trail with dense tree cover

events.description: entering a densely forested section of the trail with thick vegetation on both sides

agents.ego_description: Geralt runs along the winding forest path, passing a child standing near the trail edge as the woods close in

notable_agents.action: child standing by the path watching Geralt run past

entered.detail: thick cluster of deciduous trees and underbrush lining the left side of the path
large boulder beside the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The path enters a more secluded forested area with dense trees creating partial shade. Geralt continues running along the winding trail, passing a lone child standing by the path as the countryside becomes more wild and overgrown.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt runs from the edge of a sunny rural settlement into a secluded, overgrown forest. It begins on a dirt path lined with vineyards and wooden houses, where peasants walk under the bright midday sun. As the settlement recedes, the scene opens into a wide countryside bordered by stone walls and open fields, with the path curving left toward a distant tower on the horizon. The environment then shifts from open plains to a dense forested area, where the bright light gives way to partial shade. Finally, the camera follows the winding trail through the wilder terrain, passing a lone child standing by the path.
